display_description: Fetches and parses notebooks, sample codes, models, and articles from OpenVINO GitHub, ModelScope AI PC zone, and CSDN Intel Developer Zone; and locates/downloads models and pre-converted OpenVINO IR from ModelScope and the Intel OpenVINO Model Hub.
detail_describe: A skill to fetch, parse, and structure content from multiple online sources (OpenVINO GitHub, ModelScope, CSDN) for student recommendation and bot training, and to resolve and download models / pre-converted OpenVINO IR for local inference on Intel AIPC. It runs locally and supports offline fallbacks and China mirrors.
name: openvino-content-fetch
use_cases: Fetch and parse OpenVINO notebooks for student recommendation
Gather ModelScope AI PC zone updates, skills, and models
Retrieve CSDN Intel Developer Zone articles for learning content
Locate and download models / pre-converted OpenVINO IR for local inference
author: Zhuo
